title: Ivyline S0073201037 Spaas Unscented Pillar Candle, ± 90 Hours, Ivory, 78mm Diameter, 200mm Height
description: From the manufacturer Spaas Unscented Pillar Candle Create a tranquil scene at home with the help of our ivory pillar candle. Plus, it's non-drip so you can enjoy its bright and steady flame with total peace of mind.
